calendar.description: Senate Economic Development and Workforce Services Hearing

general_provisions: This bill modifies provisions related to local land use and water
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>defines terms;<hr><ltbullet>amends requirements for a modified feasibility request related to a proposed municipal incorporation;<hr><ltbullet>clarifies standards for county and municipal land use regulations and requirements;<hr><ltbullet>modified requirements for an ordinance establishing a planning commission;<hr><ltbullet>modifies planning commission powers and duties;<hr><ltbullet>modifies the process for reviewing and approving a new or unlisted business use;<hr><ltbullet>establishes requirements for regulating structure height;<hr><ltbullet>requires a county or municipal legislative body to make a decision on proposed land use regulation if the planning commission fails to make a timely recommendation;<hr><ltbullet>requires counties, municipalities, and special districts to adopt a written plan, beginning on January 1, 2028, for determining the reasonable future water requirement of the public before imposing a water exaction (written plan);<hr><ltbullet>requires the state engineer to make rules to establish standards for the written plan; <hr><ltbullet>addresses exaction for water and a land use authority's review of a land use application;<hr><ltbullet>modifies the requirement to place certain infrastructure completion assurances in an interest-bearing account;<hr><ltbullet>establishes requirements relating to development agreements;<hr><ltbullet>modifies the burden of proving that a land use authority's decision was arbitrary, capricious, or illegal;<hr><ltbullet>addresses requirements relating to an appeal or variance hearing;<hr><ltbullet>prohibits a legislative body from acting as an appeal authority;<hr><ltbullet>modifies the standard of review of a land use authority's decision to deny or approve a land use application;<hr><ltbullet>modifies appeal requirements; <hr><ltbullet>requires a specified municipality to allow a detached accessory dwelling unit as a permitted use in certain zones;<hr><ltbullet>clarifies notice requirements for a proposed county land use ordinance that is ministerial in nature;<hr><ltbullet>modifies a county's authority to deny an applicant a building permit or certificate of occupancy if the applicant has not completed an infrastructure improvement; and<hr><ltbullet>makes technical and conforming changes.
